titleStmt.title: SII 33.256: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 256. (A.R. No. B 334 of 1953.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk and District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1656, Ānaṁda, Māgha śu, 5. Friday corresponding to 1735 A.D., January 17, f.d.t. 23. The nakshatra was Uttarabhādrapada f.t.n. 03.

Records that a pair of gold anklets with tinkling bells (gejjalu) is the offering of Pedda-veṅkaṭaperumāḷ-nāyanivāru, son of Lakshmīdēvammavāru, the queen of Tupākula Rāmaliṁgayya-nāyanivāru. The weight of the set is given as 468(1/2) varāhas. Below this is engraved a later record stating that the anklets were re-made with an additional gold of the weight of 40 rupees by the munificence of Javīra Bāyi Bhagavaṇ Dās, mother of G.B. Narōttamdās of Bombay, in the month of September 1926, and that the weight of the jewel after remaking is 183 tolas. Published: S.I.I., Vol. XXIV, No. 568.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śālivāhana śakābdaṁbulu 1656 Agunēṭi Ānaṁdanāma saṁvatsaraṁ mākha śuddha 5 śukravāraṁ Ī śubhadinamaṁdu
śrīvāriya perumāḷu pādamulayaṁdu tupākula rāmaliṁgayya nāyunivāri paṭṭamahiṣulaina
lakṣmīdēvammavāri komāruḍu peddaveṁkaṭa perumāḷa nāyanigāru baṁgāru Aṁddelu gejjelu sama¨rpiṁci sadāśē
va jōḍu 1 ki yeḍa 468 vara . 9

saṁvatsaraṁ sepṭevaṁbar nelalō baṁbāyi śrī ji bi narōttaṁ dāsugāru talligāraina bāyi javīrabāyi bhagavaṁdāsu vāri 1929
sahaiyamu valla nalabhai rūpāyilu tūnika baṁgāru cērci yī jatagajjelanu kottagā cēyiṁcca
ḍamainadi kottagā cēyiṁccina venaka tūnika 183 tola baṁgāru 1929
Digital edition of SII 33.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
